acceptance_criteria.text: Stage 7 adds a safe migration/cleanup layer for legacy AIAgents, legacy business AI settings, OpenClaw preview bridging, docs, and tests without deleting live fields.
proof: src/services/agent_legacy_migration.py builds a read-only migration plan.
Business AI settings are mapped to persona/blueprint targets and marked deprecated_migration_source.
OpenClaw docs describe blueprint/run/capability runtime model.
gaps: No production data mutation or field deletion in this stage.

known_gaps: Deprecated legacy fields remain backward-compatible reads until a future Alembic migration plus UI/API no-read proof.
